prompt: Outfit: a fitted pale baby-blue cropped long-sleeve top in lightweight stretch ribbed knit, featuring a softly ruched sweetheart neckline, thin crisscross halter straps around the neck, and a small tonal button placket at the center front, paired with an ivory-white ultra-short tiered ruffle skort in lightweight matte woven fabric with multiple softly flared cascading layers and a finely gathered inner-shorts hem visible underneath, white knee-high floral lace socks, black chunky platform loafers in smooth leather-like material with a small generalized triangular metal plaque and thick lugged rubber soles, and a pale blue-and-white gingham drawstring shoulder bag with a softly structured rounded body, slim shoulder strap, and tied side cords, no bag charms, premium fabric texture, realistic garment construction, clean stitching, natural seam tension, believable fabric weight, subtle wrinkles, realistic drape, refined edge finishing, visible seams, real folds, well-made clothing details, high-quality material feel, detailed garment realism, natural high-quality everyday fashion, not costume-like, not cheap-looking, plus a random mix of delicate silver-tone feminine Y2K accessories with a clean romantic mood and light visual volume
promptEn: Outfit: a fitted pale baby-blue cropped long-sleeve top in lightweight stretch ribbed knit, featuring a softly ruched sweetheart neckline, thin crisscross halter straps around the neck, and a small tonal button placket at the center front, paired with an ivory-white ultra-short tiered ruffle skort in lightweight matte woven fabric with multiple softly flared cascading layers and a finely gathered inner-shorts hem visible underneath, white knee-high floral lace socks, black chunky platform loafers in smooth leather-like material with a small generalized triangular metal plaque and thick lugged rubber soles, and a pale blue-and-white gingham drawstring shoulder bag with a softly structured rounded body, slim shoulder strap, and tied side cords, no bag charms, premium fabric texture, realistic garment construction, clean stitching, natural seam tension, believable fabric weight, subtle wrinkles, realistic drape, refined edge finishing, visible seams, real folds, well-made clothing details, high-quality material feel, detailed garment realism, natural high-quality everyday fashion, not costume-like, not cheap-looking, plus a random mix of delicate silver-tone feminine Y2K accessories with a clean romantic mood and light visual volume
promptZh: 穿搭：一件修身浅婴儿蓝短款长袖上衣，采用轻盈弹力罗纹针织面料，配有柔和的褶皱心形领口、颈部细交叉挂脖系带，以及前中处的小型同色系纽扣门襟，搭配 一条象牙白超短层叠荷叶边短裙，采用轻盈哑光梭织面料，具有多层柔和外扩的层叠设计，内衬短裤下摆隐约可见，白色及膝花朵蕾丝袜，黑色厚底乐福鞋（采用光滑仿皮材质，带有小型通用三角形金属铭牌及厚实橡胶齿轮底），以及一个 浅蓝白格纹抽绳单肩包，包身圆润且结构柔和，配有细肩带和侧边系带，无包挂，高级面料质感，写实的服装结构，整洁的缝线，自然的接缝张力，可信的布料重量，细微褶皱，逼真的垂坠感，精致的边缘处理，可见的接缝，真实的折痕，做工考究的服装细节，高品质面料触感，细腻的服装写实度，自然的日常高品质时尚，非演出服感，无廉价感，外加随机搭配的精致银色调女性化 Y2K 配饰，营造出干净浪漫的氛围与轻盈的视觉量感
